units.name: Author 5 incident_investigation multi-repo tasks
units.description: Author 5 new incident_investigation multi-repo tasks across diverse ecosystems: Istio/Envoy (dual), Prometheus/Alertmanager (dual), containerd/runc/moby (tri), Kafka/Connect-JDBC (dual), Flux/helm-controller (dual). Each task needs task.toml, ground_truth.json, instruction.md, and check scripts. Use 'investigate' pattern for at least 3 of 5. Follow the exact format of existing multi-repo tasks like benchmarks/customer_escalation/err-provenance-dual-docker-001/.
acceptance: 5 new task directories exist under benchmarks/incident_response/ with names matching incident-investigation-dual-* or incident-investigation-tri-*
Each task directory contains: task.toml, ground_truth.json, instruction.md, and a checks/ directory with at least 2 check scripts
Each task.toml has difficulty_stratum = 'dual_repo' or 'tri_repo', task_type = 'incident_investigation', session_type = 'single'
Each task.toml lists real GitHub repos with actual release tags/SHAs in [[repos]] sections
Each task.toml has 2-4 [[checkpoints]] with weights summing to 1.0
Each task.toml has [ground_truth] section with required_files from 2+ repos
At least 3 of the 5 tasks use multi_repo_pattern = 'investigate'
Each ground_truth.json has task_id, task_type, repos, required_files, and expected_answer fields

units.name: Author 3 error_provenance multi-repo tasks
units.description: Author 3 new error_provenance multi-repo tasks: Grafana/Prometheus (dual, investigate), Celery/kombu (dual, investigate), requests/urllib3 (dual, investigate). Each needs task.toml, ground_truth.json, instruction.md, and check scripts. These expand into Python and cloud-native ecosystems. Follow the exact format of benchmarks/customer_escalation/err-provenance-dual-docker-001/.
acceptance: 3 new task directories exist under benchmarks/customer_escalation/ named err-provenance-dual-grafana-001, err-provenance-dual-celery-001, err-provenance-dual-requests-001
Each task directory contains: task.toml, ground_truth.json, instruction.md, and a checks/ directory with at least 2 check scripts
Each task.toml has difficulty_stratum = 'dual_repo', task_type = 'error_provenance'
Each task.toml lists real GitHub repos with actual release tags in [[repos]] sections
Each task.toml has multi_repo_pattern = 'investigate'
At least 2 of the 3 tasks use Python ecosystem repos (not Go)
Each ground_truth.json has task_id, task_type, repos, required_files, and expected_answer fields

units.name: Author 6 dependency_graph + refactor_orchestration tasks
units.description: Author 3 dependency_graph tri-repo tasks (Jackson/Spring/Boot, OpenSSL/curl/git, boto3/aws-cli/s3transfer) and 3 refactor_orchestration tri-repo tasks (Spring Framework/Boot/Kafka, tokio/hyper/axum, Babel/webpack/Next.js). Each needs task.toml, ground_truth.json, instruction.md, check scripts. Follow the exact format of existing multi-repo tasks like benchmarks/customer_escalation/err-provenance-dual-docker-001/.
acceptance: 3 new dependency_graph task directories exist under benchmarks/dependency_management/ named dep-traversal-tri-jackson-001, dep-traversal-tri-openssl-001, dep-traversal-tri-boto3-001

3 new refactor_orchestration task directories exist under benchmarks/technical_debt/ named refactor-orchestration-tri-spring-001, refactor-orchestration-tri-tokio-001, refactor-orchestration-tri-babel-001
Each task directory contains: task.toml, ground_truth.json, instruction.md, and a checks/ directory with at least 2 check scripts
All 6 task.toml files have difficulty_stratum = 'tri_repo'
Each task.toml lists 3 real GitHub repos with actual release tags/SHAs
Tasks collectively span at least 3 non-Go ecosystems (Java, Rust, Python, JavaScript)
Each task.toml has 2-4 [[checkpoints]] with weights summing to 1.0
Each ground_truth.json has required_files from all 3 repos

units.name: Author 8 tasks for config_drift, db_schema, dead_code, api_contract, support_mapping
units.description: Author 8 remaining multi-repo tasks: 2 config_drift (Kustomize/ArgoCD/Flux tri-repo, Terraform core/provider dual), 1 db_schema_evolution (Supabase/PostgREST/GoTrue tri-repo), 1 dead_code_necropsy (Angular/Components dual), 3 api_contract (protobuf/gRPC/Python tri-repo, FastAPI/httpx dual, Envoy/Istio/go-control-plane tri-repo), 1 support_code_mapping (Ansible/Jinja dual). Follow the exact format of existing multi-repo tasks like benchmarks/customer_escalation/err-provenance-dual-docker-001/.
acceptance: 2 new config_drift task dirs in benchmarks/platform_engineering/ with dual_repo or tri_repo stratum
1 new db_schema_evolution task dir in benchmarks/feature_delivery/ with tri_repo stratum
1 new dead_code_necropsy task dir in benchmarks/technical_debt/ with dual_repo stratum
3 new api_contract task dirs in benchmarks/dependency_management/ with dual_repo or tri_repo stratum
1 new support_code_mapping task dir in benchmarks/customer_escalation/ with dual_repo stratum
All 8 task directories contain: task.toml, ground_truth.json, instruction.md, and checks/ with at least 2 scripts
Each task.toml lists real GitHub repos with actual tags/SHAs
At least 4 of the 8 tasks use multi_repo_pattern = 'investigate'

units.name: Retire ~25 single-repo tasks to reach 45% strict multi-repo
units.description: Move approximately 25 large_single tasks to benchmarks/_archived/ to bring strict multi-repo percentage above 45%. After Layer 0, we'll have ~143 tasks with ~57 strict multi-repo (40%). Need to cut ~25 to reach ~57/118 = 48%. Select from types with highest over-representation: support_code_mapping (12 large_single → cut 8), error_provenance (11 large_single → cut 7), db_schema_evolution (10 large_single → cut 6), config_drift (5 large_single → cut 2), incident_investigation (6 large_single → cut 2). Update sweep_manifest.json and validation_registry.json. Never drop a type below calibration+multi-repo count.
acceptance: At least 20 task directories moved from benchmarks/<suite>/ to benchmarks/_archived/
No task type has fewer total active tasks than its calibration + multi-repo count
Strict multi-repo (dual+tri+multi) / total active tasks >= 0.45 when computed by: find benchmarks/ -name task.toml -not -path '*_archived*'
configs/sweep_manifest.json does not reference any archived task IDs
configs/validation_registry.json does not reference any archived task IDs

units.name: Create task mix validation script and update repo_versions.json
units.description: Create scripts/validation/task_mix_validator.py that checks all PRD task mix targets. Also update configs/repo_versions.json with SHA entries for any new repos. The script should scan all active task.toml files (excluding _archived/) and report: total count, per-stratum distribution, per-type multi-repo coverage, ecosystem diversity, investigate pattern percentage. Exit 0 if targets met, 1 otherwise.
acceptance: scripts/validation/task_mix_validator.py exists and is executable

Running python scripts/validation/task_mix_validator.py produces a report with: total task count, per-stratum counts and percentages, per-type multi-repo coverage, ecosystem distribution, investigate pattern percentage
Script exits 0 if: strict multi-repo >= 45%, all 10 types have >= 2 multi-repo variants, no single ecosystem > 40%
Script exits 1 with specific failure messages if any target is not met
configs/repo_versions.json contains entries for all repos used by active tasks
